introSection: Peck's Prancing Ponies was a quad wooden roller coaster located at Old Orchard Park in Old Orchard Beach, Maine, USA. It was a steeplechase style coaster with a large figure eight layout.

sections.title: External links
sections.content: * A picture of Peck's Prancing Ponies on Google Books

fullText:
Peck's Prancing Ponies was a quad wooden roller coaster located at Old Orchard Park in Old Orchard Beach, Maine, USA. It was a steeplechase style coaster with a large figure eight layout.


 * A picture of Peck's Prancing Ponies on Google Books
